name: status-reporter
description: Local-development marketplace for status-reporter — a two-command daily status reporting plugin (capture fragments → render one polished PDF). Single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: status-reporter
plugins.description: Two-step daily status reporting: /status-log captures each session as an append-only fragment; /status-export merges/de-duplicates/polishes all fragments into one professional bilingual (en/ar) PDF via a fixed HTML template. Cross-platform; renders with a headless Chromium browser CLI (no MCP required); no messaging side-channels.
